race.comment: ALL KING'S (3) has more upside than most and looks ready to win after back-to-back placings. Has been winding up late so looks suited by the extra ground. Tricky gate but looks tough to stop. COSTA STAR (5) is a 24-start maiden who looks close to breaking the duck after finishing in the placings at her last couple of runs, most recently when one length away in third over 1200m at this track. Query at the trip but drawn for every chance. SWISHGOBANGO (2) steps up in trip and is backing up seven days after finishing second at this track. Looks ready to win and draw for a soft run. THE SESSIONE (4) raced on the speed from the outset last start and finished third, beaten 1.4 lengths, over 1200m at this track. Ready to go a couple better. AL'S GAL (12) is a three-start maiden who missed the frame first-up but has improved in subsequent runs, finishing in the money last start over 1200m at this track after being in contention on the corner. Take catching.
